evals.prompt: Generate the full PPE pipeline evaluation report with ROC and AUC curves for all models
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML report at results/reports/ppe_evaluation_report.html containing ROC/AUC curves for every model (SVM, RF, ExtraTrees, GBM, Ensemble, CNN), a per-class AUC heatmap, precision-recall curves, confusion matrices, and a model comparison summary.

evals.prompt: Show me how the models are doing — I want to see validation results and which model has the best AUC
evals.expected_output: The report generator script is run, producing the HTML report. The assistant summarises the macro AUC scores per model (CNN ~0.978 being best) and points to the report file.

evals.prompt: Can you make a report showing the CCTV validation results and model performance summary?
evals.expected_output: HTML report is generated, including the CCTV detection table (people/classified/violations per image) and the prod_cctv_validation.png embedded in the report.
